title: The Right Way To Build AI Agents — With NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis
summary: Alex Kantrowitz hosts NVIDIA's Adel El Hallak and ServiceNow's Joe Davis to discuss building AI agents in enterprise contexts. The conversation covers agent safety, governance, and ServiceNow's L1-AI-IT specialist which has automated 90% of internal support tickets, along with industry outlook for autonomous agents.
